summary: The verification file was added to the correct location (frontend/public/google38eb840a952aed49.html), but its content does not exactly match the required format. The file contains 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49.html' (with an extra '.html' suffix) instead of the required 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49'.

missing_requirements.requirement: The file must contain the standard Google site verification content format: 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49'
missing_requirements.reason: The file content shown in the diff is 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49.html' which includes an erroneous '.html' extension appended to the verification token. The correct content should be 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49' without the '.html' suffix. This would cause Google Search Console verification to fail.
